sourceMovie.title: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto My Big Fat Greek Wedding (2002) as a comedy theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Hope Springs
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Big Fat Greek Wedding clicked for you, Hope Springs (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Fools Rush In
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Big Fat Greek Wedding clicked for you, Fools Rush In (1997) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: CODA
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Big Fat Greek Wedding clicked for you, CODA (2021) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and romance, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My Big Fat Greek Wedding?
faq.answer: Try Hope Springs, Fools Rush In, CODA—each shares DNA with My Big Fat Greek Wedding while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My Big Fat Greek Wedding?
faq.answer: My Big Fat Greek Wedding (2002) is best described as Comedy, Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My Big Fat Greek Wedding part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "My Big Fat Greek Wedding Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
